name: synthetic
description: Synthetic OBFUSCATED EPUB whose headings are styled <div>s with meaningless class names (.chap, .sect) — the role lives ONLY in the CSS (sans+bold+centred vs serif body). No existing heading detector keys off these names, so StyleHeadingDetector must read the stylesheet, build the font hierarchy (chapter > section > body), and recover h1/h2, corroborated by toc.ncx. Locks in the CSS-font-hierarchy heading recovery (the antonio0101selections / Gramsci case).
